name: worldcup-2026-fan-engagement-prototype
description: Independent World Cup 2026 fan engagement prototype — grounded AI, offline-ready. Not affiliated with FIFA.

source.ai: js/ai.js — REQ_07 (generateTeamSummary, detectDataLimitations), REQ_08 (generateFanRecommendations), REQ_09 (aiHasKey fallback) (+ js/config.js)
source.ui: js/ui.js — REQ_01, REQ_02, REQ_03, REQ_04, REQ_05
source.tests: tests/unit.test.js — 14 zero-dependency unit tests (run: npm test)
